title: ClawBench-Lite Manifest
description: Schema for ClawBench-Lite — a curated 20-task subset of ClawBench. The manifest lists selected task_ids without duplicating task data; each entry references a test-cases/<dir>/task.json that must exist.

version.description: Semantic version of the Lite selection (e.g., "0.1"). Bump when tasks are added, removed, or re-scored.

created.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this version of the manifest was locked.

rubric_max.description: Maximum possible rubric total. For v0.1 this is 12 (4 axes × 3 points each).

total_tasks.description: Number of tasks in the Lite subset. Must equal the length of the tasks array.

notes.description: Free-text rationale and provenance notes for this Lite version.

skipped_categories.description: Metaclasses intentionally excluded from Lite v0.1. Documented here so the omission reads as a curatorial choice, not an oversight.

tier_distribution.description: Per-tier slot allocation — flagship/core/wildcard, summing to total_tasks.

tasks.description: Selected tasks. Each entry references a task.json under test-cases/ and records its score and rationale.

task_id.description: Matches metadata.task_id in the referenced task.json

metaclass.description: Matches metadata.metaclass in the referenced task.json

url_pattern_concrete.description: True if eval_schema.url_pattern is a real regex (machine-scorable); false if it is __PLACEHOLDER_WILL_NOT_MATCH__ (agentic-scoring only). Both are allowed in Lite v0.1 because eval is fully agentic.
